title: Your Environment Beats Your Willpower

scenes.text: You don't lack willpower. Your environment is just designed against you.
Every notification, every snack on the counter, every app icon is a vote against your goals.
Winners don't fight temptation. They remove it. Phone in another room. Shoes by the door.
Make the good choice the easy choice, and discipline stops feeling like war.
scenes.label: MAKE IT EASY

scenes.text: Follow for your daily dose of discipline.

description: Stop fighting temptation - remove it. Design your environment so the good choice is the easy choice. Follow for daily discipline!
